---
title: "Blog"
title-block-banner: true
listing:
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"       # direct posts: post-slug/index.qmd
    - "*/*/index.qmd"     # series posts: series-name/post-slug/index.qmd
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
sidebar: false
toc: false
---
